changeSet.author: san
changeSet.sql: create or replace view config.config as with robots_properties as( select 'robots.' || robots.access_tool || '.' || robots.name || '.' || robot_props.key "key", robot_props.value "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_properties robot_props on robots.id = robot_props.robot_id join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'executor' union select 'access-tools.' || robots.name "key", robots.access_tool "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'dispatcher' union select robots.name || '.' || times.check_method "key", cast(times.processing_time as text) "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'ppm' join config.processing_times times on robots.id = times.robot_id ) select conf.application application, conf.profile profile, conf.label "label", g_props.key "key", g_props.value "value" from config.configurations conf join config.global_properties g_props on conf.id = g_props.configuration_id union select conf.application application, conf.profile profile, conf.label "label", robots_properties.key "key", robots_properties.value "value" from config.configurations conf join robots_properties on conf.id = robots_properties.configuration_id
changeSet.rollback: create or replace view config.config as with robots_properties as( select 'robots.' || robots.access_tool || '.' || robots.name || '.' || robot_props.key "key", robot_props.value "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_properties robot_props on robots.id = robot_props.robot_id join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'executor' union select 'access-tools.' || robots.name "key", robots.access_tool "value", robots_configurations.configuration_id configuration_id from config.robots robots join config.robots_configurations on robots.id = robots_configurations.robot_id join config.configurations on robots_configurations.configuration_id = configurations.id and configurations.application = 'dispatcher' ) select conf.application application, conf.profile profile, conf.label "label", g_props.key "key", g_props.value "value" from config.configurations conf join config.global_properties g_props on conf.id = g_props.configuration_id union select conf.application application, conf.profile profile, conf.label "label", robots_properties.key "key", robots_properties.value "value" from config.configurations conf join robots_properties on conf.id = robots_properties.configuration_id
